title: SSID EMS OIDC Configuration
description: Optional OIDC identity verification. Disabled by default. Requires local JWKS file when enabled.

enabled.description: Enable OIDC token verification. False = skip entirely.

issuer.description: OIDC issuer URL. Required when enabled.

jwks_path.description: Absolute path to local JWKS JSON file. REQUIRED when enabled. No remote fetch.
